_comment: TEMPORARY relative HE op-cost weights in 'key-switch' units, used by the Rotom layout-assignment cost model. A ciphertext rotation and a ciphertext x ciphertext multiply each cost ~1 key-switch (the dominant FHE cost); additions are comparatively negligible. These are placeholders -- replace with values measured for the target scheme and parameters. This file documents the defaults mirrored in CostModel.h (RotomCostModel).
